options.content: Brought to you by PostgresAI

list.description: Smart truncation: shows 'SELECT ... FROM table_names'. Raw texts: shows beginning of query as-is.
list.label: Query texts
list.name: legend_label
list.query: Smart truncation : displayname_long, Raw texts : displayname_raw_long
